## Summary

What changed, and why?

## Scope

- [ ] Rust core/protocol/runtime/CLI
- [ ] Python SDK
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Examples
- [ ] Tests or benchmarks
- [ ] CI or repository maintenance

## Validation

Commands run:

```text

```

## Contributor Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and reviewable.
- [ ] Public APIs are documented when changed.
- [ ] Tests or examples are updated when behavior changes.
- [ ] Architecture or compatibility impacts are called out.
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or sensitive data are included.

## Notes for Reviewers

Mention risks, follow-up work, or areas where you want specific feedback.
